emails.subject: Brent Hendry
emails.body: Brent Hendry Have you heard if Brent will be in Houston this week or early next week? SS

emails.subject: Brent Hendry
emails.body: Brent Hendry Have you heard if Brent will be in Houston this week or early next week? SS

emails.subject: Re: Brent Hendry
emails.body: Re: Brent Hendry I had a voice mail from him Mon or Tues that said he would try and get into the office either today or tomorrow. I expect he may be tied up with getting his son into the hospital and catching up with his wife so we may not see him til Monday. Sara Shackleton 10/21/99 10:38 AM
